post.description:
Persist chosen thresholds to the run config (audited).

Writes ``similarity.threshold`` and/or ``active_learning.low/high_threshold``
into the target pipeline-run config. Because Fellegi-Sunter posteriors are
stored as the edge ``similarity``, the tuner histogram and these thresholds
share one scale — no separate score↔posterior band remap is needed.

schema.title: Response Apply Threshold Api Metrics  Collection  Apply Threshold Post

post.description:
Record a human correction for a pair and apply it to the graph.

The verdict is persisted (for threshold optimization) and then applied:
a ``no_match`` suppresses the similarity edge, a ``match`` confirms it, and
the affected connected component is re-clustered. ``clusters_changed`` lets
the frontend invalidate its cluster caches.

schema.title: Response Submit Verdict Api Review  Collection  Pair  Key A   Key B  Verdict Post

get.description: Verdict counts by decision type.

schema.title: Response Verdict Stats Api Review  Collection  Stats Get

get.description: Return current low/high thresholds from the most recent optimization.
